g.text: Custom TRL scoring logic (runs in browser)

svg.text: No database — all data lives in browser session storage only. Nothing is persisted server-side.
Client — browser UI and session storage
Hosting — Vercel edge CDN and serverless runtime
Client-side logic — TRACER calculator runs in browser
API routes — AI and report only
Services — OpenAI, PDF generator, Nodemailer + Gmail
